decision: `timeline/story-branches.json` is the sufficient detailed timeline module. This file is an RP-facing index for branch selection, source entry mapping, and cutoff decisions rather than a duplicate explicit chronology.
branchSelectionChecklist: Choose exactly one default branchSet before play: main-db-to-z, gt-branch, or super-branch.
Set cutoffDate/dateRange and freeze character forms available at that point.
Mark movie/anime-original events as optional side events unless session notes explicitly enable them.
Declare dragon-ball version, resurrection limits, map durability, and whether planet-level attacks are permitted.
If enabling GT, do not also default-enable Super god-ki continuity; if enabling Super, do not default-enable GT black-star/SS4 aftermath.

sourceEntryMap.label: 第一部上：寻珠、龟仙流、红缎带

continuityRisks.summary: GT 的黑星龙珠、超4、贝比/邪恶龙后续与超的神之气、多宇宙和超级英雄线默认互斥。
continuityRisks.rpHandling: 只在明确选择的 branchSet 中启用对应规则；另一分支可作为平行宇宙传闻或禁用。

continuityRisks.summary: 源时间线把大量剧场版/动画原创异闻嵌入日期附近。
continuityRisks.rpHandling: 默认为 optional-movie-side-events，不作为主线必经事件；启用时记录 Boss、地点破坏和角色强度影响。

continuityRisks.summary: 源中仅第一部上条目 enabled=true，其余时间线条目多为 disabled 多选一。
continuityRisks.rpHandling: curated 可作为可选分支索引使用，但不能声称全部已在源世界书同时启用。
